name: M365 Inactive User Accounts
description: Identifies enabled user accounts with no sign-in activity in 90 days
query: SELECT id, user_principal_name, display_name, last_sign_in_datetime FROM entra_users WHERE account_enabled = true AND (last_sign_in_datetime IS NULL OR last_sign_in_datetime < NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days')
remediation: Review inactive accounts and disable or remove access if no longer needed. Perform periodic access reviews.
